message:
feat(fnmatch): wire fl::fnmatch to delegate to core engine (bd-fnm-2)

Sub-bead 2 of bd-fnm-epic. Replaces ~280 lines of inline fnmatch_impl
+ classify_bracket + BracketShape in frankenlibc-abi/src/string_abi.rs
with a thin shim over frankenlibc_core::string::fnmatch::fnmatch_match
(added in bd-fnm-1).

The shim:
- Adapts NUL-terminated C strings to &[u8] via CStr::to_bytes()
- Converts the user's c_int flags to FnmatchFlags::from_bits()
- Returns 0 / FNM_NOMATCH per POSIX

Public ABI signature unchanged. All 3 fnmatch+glob conformance tests
pass; full abi crate test suite green with no regressions.

Closes bd-fnm-2; bd-fnm-3 will extend conformance with FNM_LEADING_DIR
and property-based tests.
